title: Documentation Is Governance Memory
prompt: Ask whether the system's purpose, data, evaluation, limits, risks, owners, changes, and remedies can be reconstructed.

title: Model Cards Should Include Limits
prompt: Check whether the model card explains intended use, prohibited use, failure modes, subgroup performance, and monitoring.

title: Datasheets Make Data History Visible
prompt: Review collection, composition, labels, preprocessing, missingness, recommended uses, and maintenance.
